message:
feat(connectors): harden Discord, Telegram, and Twitter connector implementations

Discord connector (connector.rs, gateway.rs):
  Expand rate-limit handling and connection recovery logic in the gateway
  layer. Add resilient reconnection with backoff, improve heartbeat
  tracking, and refine event dispatch. The connector gains richer error
  categorization for gateway close codes.

Telegram connector (connector.rs):
  Strengthen long-polling reliability with improved timeout handling,
  update offset tracking, and error recovery. Add structured logging for
  poll cycles and message processing.

Twitter connector (connector.rs, stream.rs):
  Refactor stream processing to handle partial JSON frames and reconnect
  on stream interruption. Improve filtered-stream rule management and
  add connection-level metrics tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
